name: William Oplinger
background: William F. Oplinger is President and Chief Executive Officer of Alcoa Corporation. He has been with Alcoa since 2000 and previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operations Officer from February 2023 to September 2023, and as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer from November 2016 to February 2023.

commpanies.name: Alcoa Corporation
commpanies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
